case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JOHNIE GILLIAM et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED OCT-04-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GILLIAM, JOHNIE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GILLIAM, JOHNIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 SIXTH STREET, #411, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, ** JUDGMENT ALSO APPLIES TO ALL UNKNOWN/UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES **
